FlowForm Studio PRO v0.2.1 hardens the consistency guarantees behind publication,
realtime updates, and sandbox cleanup.

## Highlights

- Relational immutable form and workflow snapshots with protected history endpoints
- Idempotent publication for repeated and concurrent requests on the same draft
  revision
- Version-bound submissions that keep using their original workflow after newer
  versions are published
- Runtime-validated aggregate fields for latest version, snapshot count, and the
  version pinned to an active submission
- Explicit server relay terminology and canonical browser refetch after every
  authenticated Socket.IO reconnect
- Failure-safe expiry cleanup that deletes MinIO objects before PostgreSQL metadata
  and retains failed rows for retry
- Focused tests for publish coalescing, historical version lookup, pinned workflow
  execution, and cleanup recovery

## Guarantees

Published snapshots cannot be overwritten. A successful publication commits its
snapshot, audit entry, and outbox event in the same PostgreSQL transaction. The
project does not claim durable browser event delivery or exactly-once execution.
Socket.IO remains a best-effort invalidation channel, while HTTP state is canonical.

## Runtime

The complete Docker Compose topology includes PostgreSQL, Redis, MinIO, NestJS, the
React PWA, and Caddy. Recruiter sandboxes remain isolated and expire after 24 hours.
